name: Chili Con Carne
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onions.
2. Melt the butter and fry the onions until golden brown.
3. Add the ground beef to the pan and stir until it is no longer pink, but still loose.
4. Season with salt and chili powder.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the pimiento and add it to the mixture.
6. Stir in the beans.
7. Serve with optional garnishes of cheese or raw onion, if desired.
